result.summary: Imported and live-verified Pogo Storm: Surge Battery. Added a visible 100-point auto-recovering stomp battery that blocks under-cost spam, an exact 1-to-100 target horde ramp over 30 seconds, and periodic warned surge releases under a 125-foe cap. Two-direction attachment motion, restart, energy depletion/recovery, two surge releases, near-target peak population, boot capture, failure stability, and zero console errors passed.
